mapper.select: SELECT o.option_no AS optionNo, o.option_type AS optionType, o.option_name AS optionName, o.option_price AS optionPrice, o.option_carbon AS optionCarbon FROM menu_option_map mom JOIN option_tbl o ON mom.option_no = o.option_no WHERE mom.menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.update: UPDATE menu_tbl SET menu_name = #{menuName}, menu_info = #{menuInfo}, menu_price = #{menuPrice}, menu_category = #{menuCategory}, menu_image = #{menuImage}, menu_carbon = #{menuCarbon} WHERE menu_id = #{menuId} AND store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carbon_menu_map (menu_id, product_id, container_count) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{productId}, #{count})
